series_metadata.series_title: Family Assistance Program Plans and Supports
series_metadata.series_description: Published plans and reports detailing program activity and accomplishments of the Office of Family Assistance in administering the Temporary Assistance to Needy Families (TANF); Temporary Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP); Ohio Works First (OWF); Disability Financial Assistance (DFA); and Food Stamp Employment and Training (FSET) programs. Files also include copies of Ohio''s TANF State Plan; FSET and Prevention, Retention and Contingency Plans.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office disposition. ; Electronic: in office disposition
